constraints.name: positiveMaxUsage
constraints.message: Max usage hours must be positive

constraints.name: warnMaintenanceDue
constraints.messageTemplate: Equipment '{equipmentName}' is due for maintenance in {days} day(s)

constraints.name: warnOverdueMaintenance
constraints.messageTemplate: Equipment '{equipmentName}' is overdue for maintenance by {days} day(s)

constraints.name: warnHighUsage
constraints.messageTemplate: Equipment '{equipmentName}' has reached {usage}% of its recommended usage limit

constraints.name: warnPoorCondition
constraints.messageTemplate: Equipment '{equipmentName}' is in poor condition and should be inspected

constraints.name: warnOverdueWorkOrder
constraints.messageTemplate: Work order '{title}' for {equipment} is overdue by {days} day(s)

constraints.name: warnConflictWithEvents
constraints.messageTemplate: Scheduling {maintenanceType} maintenance for '{equipmentName}' - check for event conflicts

value.value: Cannot schedule maintenance for retired equipment

constraints.name: warnDeactivateActiveEquipment
constraints.messageTemplate: Taking '{equipmentName}' out of service - ensure no events are dependent on it

constraints.name: warnConditionDegraded
constraints.messageTemplate: Equipment '{equipmentName}' condition has degraded to poor - schedule maintenance

value.value: Max usage hours must be positive

constraints.name: warnRetireFunctionalEquipment
constraints.messageTemplate: Retiring equipment '{equipmentName}' in {condition} condition - consider transfer or sale

value.value: Can only assign open work orders
Work order must be assigned or open to start
Work order must be in progress to complete

constraints.name: warnCancelWorkOrder
constraints.messageTemplate: Cancelling work order '{title}' - ensure equipment is properly addressed

constraints.name: warnCriticalWithoutSchedule
constraints.messageTemplate: Critical work order '{title}' should be scheduled within 24 hours

policies.name: ManagersCanManageMaintenanceWorkOrders
policies.message: Only managers can manage work orders
